ogtitle: Complimentary lounge access for delayed flights
content: Skip to login   Skip to main content   Skip to chat   Personal   Credit cards   NAB Rewards credit cards   NAB Rewards Signature Credit Card   Complimentary lounge access for delayed flights   Complimentary lounge access for delayed flights   Enjoy complimentary access to selected airport lounges worldwide with a NAB Rewards Signature Card.  *   View Disclaimer 1  Find a lounge , opens in new window   Lounge access   Enjoy access to complimentary lounges in the event of a flight delay of more than 60 minutes.  As a NAB Rewards Signature cardholder, you are entitled to complimentary lounge access for you and up to four travel companions in the event of a delay of 60 minutes or more.  *   View Disclaimer 1  You must register 24 hours prior to your scheduled flight departure. Typically, you can register up to 364 days in advance if a flight has been scheduled.   Alternatively, if a lounge is not available, you will receive a dining credit to offset a dollar amount off the total bill at select dining options.  The email containing the lounge pass will contain instructions for locating the available lounges in the airport.   How to register  Follow these easy steps to register for a lounge pass.  Log in to the NAB app or Internet Banking.  Select Cards.  Select NAB Rewards Signature Card.  Select Features and Benefits/Card Benefits.  Select Delayed flight lounge pass registration.  Enter your NAB Rewards Signature Credit Card number.  Complete your passenger and flight details.  Ensure you have received the confirmation email.  If your flight is delayed, a lounge pass voucher or a voucher at select dining venues will be sent via email and SMS to the cardholder. Once you’ve received this, all you need to do is show your boarding pass and lounge pass voucher (you may have to show your NAB Rewards Signature Card).  Need more information?   If you want to know more about Delayed Flight Lounge Pass, check out our frequently asked questions.   Explore insurances  Your NAB card could be eligible for one or more of the following complimentary insurances.  Complimentary international travel insurance   If your card is eligible for complimentary international travel insurance, this is what you need to know.  Complimentary domestic travel insurance   Learn what you need to know about your domestic travel insurance.  Complimentary rental vehicle excess insurance in Australia   How to make a claim, check eligibility and understand your policy.  Contact us for Signature card enquiries   For more information about Delayed Flight Lounge Pass, you can contact Collinson Insurance Services Limited.  Email   smartdelaysupport@collinsongroup.com  Phone   +44 203 725 1601 (International call fees may apply). Call centre located in South Africa with 24 hours, 7 days a week operating hours.  Important Information   Terms and Conditions  Disclaimer 1   Delayed flight lounge pass  Complimentary Delayed Flight Lounge Passes are provided by Collinson Insurance Services Limited (which operates the LoungeKey™ Pass program), and are available to all NAB Rewards Signature Credit cardholders (Eligible Persons).  The Delayed Flight Lounge Pass gives an Eligible Person plus up to 4 travel companions complimentary access to select airport lounges at select airport locations. Alternatively, if a lounge is unavailable, Eligible Persons can use their Delayed Flight Lounge Pass to offset a dollar amount off the total bill at select dining options. Availability of airport lounges and dining options vary based on location and affiliated LoungeKey™ Partners at the time.  Not all airports offer Delayed Flight Lounge Pass and use of Delayed Flight Lounge Pass may be restricted to certain terminals. Access to and use of the Delayed Flight Lounge Pass is subject to the Terms of Use (PDF, 83KB), opens in new window  which are subject to change. You can search for locations and the conditions of use, opens in new window  applicable to each airport lounge/dining venue.  Delayed Flight Lounge Passes are not available where flights are cancelled or rescheduled to 24 hours after the flight's scheduled departure time (which will be handled by the airline directly via their own compensation process). Delayed Flight Lounge Passes are provided on a non-transferable, non-refundable and non-changeable basis. NAB is not responsible for the issue of Delayed Flight Lounge Passes, and excludes all liability for any loss or damage in connection with the issue, non-issue or use of a Delayed Flight Lounge Pass to the extent permitted by law.
